pr.title: Record: PROTEUS v7 — 11L INT6 + LoRA TTT (mean val_bpb=0.9968)

output.summary: PROTEUS v7 packs an 11-layer quantized transformer with depth-scaled residuals plus backward-looking per-document LoRA TTT adaptation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Training is standard, with eval-time LoRA adaptation per validation document rather than a val-only training regime.
techniques: INT6 uniform quantization across weight matrices
Backward-looking per-document LoRA TTT with multi-epoch passes
